title: 2 Pcs Bike Brake Cable, Universal Standard Bicycle Brake Cable, for Road Bike/Mountain Bike/MTB
features: 【High Quality Material】 The brake cable is made of high quality steel, galvanized material, resistant to wear and corrosion, it can withstand the force of the high voltage cable without breaking and helps to stop the bike instantly and can be used for a long time.
【Multi-purpose】 Bicycle brake cable set is used for mountain bikes. They can apply to electric bikes, bicycles, hiking, running, folding bike speed control.

【Brake Cable Length】 The front brake cable length is 1100mm and the rear length 1700mm. The length of the brake cable can be changed according to the length of the cable. The length of the cable can be adjusted to ensure the safety of the cyclist.

【Bicycle Brake Cable】 The inner layer is carbon steel, the core is high quality galvanized steel, which protects against rust and oxidation, the special coating makes the braking particularly stable, and the high tensile strength can provide more. Braking force and higher control operation, strong heat resistance, not only suitable for daily use, but also suitable for use in various extreme weather conditions.
【After-sales Service】 If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us, we will solve the problem within 12 hours.

specifications_table.Usage: ‎Mountain biking, road bike, electric driving, hiking, running, folding bikes
